title: cyclotrichium leucotrichum
intro: Cyclotrichium leucotrichum, also known as White Woolly Rock-sage, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate respiratory problems, such as colds and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, and to treat wounds and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial properties. Cyclotrichium leucotrichum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
